currentSessionResourcesDescription: Attachments and references will appear here after you ask.
emptyConversationDescription: Start a session from the left, then ask one specific question. If you do not have material yet, upload a file in Resources first.
emptySessionDescription: No material? Ask directly. Add material later if you want references on the right.
emptySessionTitle: Ready for your first question today?
contextEmptyDescription: You can ask directly. Attachments and references will show up here when they exist.
contextReadyDescription: Keep going. New attachments and references will collect here.
contextReferencesEmptyDescription: Ask a question in the center workspace and the cited snippets will appear here.
contextAttachmentsEmptyDescription: Send a question with attachments and this panel will summarise them.
sessionSearchEmptyDescription: Try a different keyword, or create a new session to continue.
sessionListEmptyDescription: Create a session above to begin. If you do not have material yet, upload a file in Resources first.
messageInputPlaceholder: Ask a question or describe what you want to find in the current materials
mobileContextDescription: Inspect references, previews, and the current session overview on demand.
providerSetupInlineHint: A model provider must be configured before sending
sendingInteractiveHint: Generating now, and you can stop it anytime.

markdown.externalLinkWarning: You're about to visit an external website.

assistantFailedFallback: This reply failed to generate. Retry or send the question again.
assistantStreamingInterruptedError: The stream was interrupted. Please retry.
assistantStreamingStoppedError: Generation stopped. You can continue editing or send again.
attachmentDropActiveHint: Drop to add files to the current session
attachmentDropRejectHint: Only txt, md, pdf, docx, and common image formats are supported.
attachmentCurrentTurnScopeHint: This reply will only use the current attachments as its document scope.
attachmentImageProcessingFailed: The image could not be processed. Make sure it opens correctly, then retry with a vision-capable model.
attachmentUnsupportedFileType: Only txt, md, pdf, docx, and common image formats are supported.
attachmentNoActiveSession: Please select a session before adding attachments.
